description: Returns a list of all transformations within your Fivetran account.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to fetch per page. Accepts a number in the range 1..1000; the default value is 100.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Specify the group identifier to filter transformations by group

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Specify dbt Core project identifier to filter transformations by project
